creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 161880
update firefox and firefox-i18n to 41.0.1

https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/41.0.1/releasenotes/
Fixes a few crashs and a regression in the bookmark creation.

Additionally, I've taken the liberty to do some housekeeping in www/firefox-i18n: added uz (uzbek languange), removed languages currently not available, and fixed the sort order to be the same (by xpi name) in all places.

"Works for me" - this report is submitted using the firefox 41.0.1 :)
